question_text: Name two advantages of using renewable energy sources instead of fossil fuels.
correct_answer: Any two of the following: they do not run out (sustainable); they do not produce greenhouse gases or air pollution; they do not contribute to climate change; they are better for the environment.
explanation: Renewable resources like solar, wind, and hydroelectric power are continuously replenished and produce little to no pollution, unlike burning fossil fuels which releases carbon dioxide and other harmful gases.
